title: Glucocorticoids for Patients With Acute Decompensated Heart Failure: A Protocol for a Systematic Review With Meta-Analysis and Trial Sequential Analysis
excerpt: This protocol outlines a systematic review with meta-analysis and trial sequential analysis to evaluate the efficacy and safety of glucocorticoids in treating patients with acute decompensated heart failure. The study aims to synthesize evidence from randomized controlled trials to determine whether glucocorticoid therapy provides clinical benefits in this patient population. Trial sequential analysis will be employed to assess the robustness of findings and determine whether sufficient evidence exists to draw definitive conclusions.

title: Highly sensitive m6A electrochemical biosensor based on laser-induced graphene electrodes functionalized with DNA tetrahedron/gold-antibody nanoparticle
excerpt: Researchers developed a highly sensitive electrochemical biosensor for detecting m6A (N6-methyladenosine) using laser-induced graphene electrodes functionalized with DNA tetrahedron structures and gold-antibody nanoparticles. The approach represents an advanced analytical tool for epigenetic modification detection with potential applications in biomarker-driven diagnostics.
